news.title: GSK CEO's 'scientific courage' propels plans for medley of phase 3 trials for Hansoh-partnered ADC

news.title: FDA rejects Replimune’s melanoma prospect for second time
news.snippet: The second time is not the charm for Replimune’s melanoma candidate RP1. After spurning the immunotherapy last July, the FDA has now rejected the biotech’s resubmitted application.

news.title: Fierce Biotech Fundraising Tracker '26: Vivatides' $54M series A; Life Bio lures $80M
news.snippet: The Fierce Biotech Fundraising Tracker records venture capital rounds of $50 million or more secured by biotechs.

news.title: Chutes & Ladders—Former TreeFrog CEO leaps to Orano Med

news.title: 'Can it actually deliver?': Why Big Pharma is making the leap to the quantum realm

news.title: China’s Oricell raises $110M for carcinoma CAR-T plans ahead of IPO push
news.snippet: Oricell Therapeutics has now raised over $110 million in its final funding round before the Chinese CAR-T therapy biotech seeks to go public.

news.title: In a first, a CAR-T cell therapy drives 3 autoimmune diseases into remission in a single patient

news.title: Boehringer hands over funding, marketing rights for Click’s digital therapeutic
news.snippet: Boehringer Ingelheim and Click Therapeutics are restructuring their marketing deal for the software-based schizophrenia treatment CT-155, as the German pharma also opens its coffers.

news.title: Philips recalls Trilogy Evo ventilator software, warns of ‘under-delivery’ of therapy

news.title: Gilead pays Kymera $45M to glue preclinical protein degrader onto burgeoning oncology pipeline
news.snippet: Gilead has tucked another drug candidate into a pipeline bulging from a recent deal flurry, paying $45 million to exercise its option on Kymera Therapeutics’ preclinical anticancer molecular glue degr

news.title: J&J launches latest version of its pulsed ablation device after nabbing CE Mark
news.snippet: J&J Medtech launched the latest version of its pulsed ablation device after receiving CE Mark approval in Europe.

news.title: 'It’s going to be huge': The 'diabolical' molecule poised to become biotech's next gold rush
news.snippet: In the early 1960s, Norwegian physician Kåre Berg, M.D., was trying to identify new blood types when he accidentally discovered a lipoprotein with perplexing properties.

news.title: Judge rules that HHS must face states' lawsuit over RFK Jr.'s agency overhaul, massive layoffs
news.snippet: A federal judge rejected the Trump administration's bid to dismiss a group of states' lawsuit challenging Robert F. Kennedy Jr.'s restructuring of the Department of Health and Human Services.

news.title: Roche takes 'leap of faith' with $20M bet on C4T’s antibody-targeted protein degraders

news.title: Avalyn plans IPO to fund phase 3 trials of inhaled versions of approved respiratory drugs
news.snippet: Avalyn Pharma is eyeing an IPO as the biotech seeks more funds to take its inhaled versions of approved drugs for lung conditions into phase 3 trials.

news.title: HHS, after legal setback, updates ACIP charter to put more emphasis on vaccine safety
news.snippet: HHS secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. is continuing to reshape the CDC’s Advisory Committee on Immunization Practices in a way that’s setting off alarm bells for some experts.

news.title: Starting material sourcing bottlenecks increase US drug shortage risks: report

news.title: Novartis cuts 114 more jobs at New Jersey HQ as restructuring rolls on
news.snippet: Novartis is making further workforce reductions at its U.S. headquarters in New Jersey, planning to remove 114 positions as the drugmaker rejigs its sales team for rare disease medicines.

news.title: Charles River flows into Boston to help AHA bridge cardiovascular health divide
news.snippet: Charles River Laboratories has backed an American Heart Association campaign, joining forces with the nonprofit on cardiovascular disease awareness, prevention and community health initiatives.

news.title: Envision hires ConcertAI, IQVIA alum Nick Jones as its med comms president
news.snippet: Envision Pharma Group has hired clinical research veteran Nick Jones as president of its Envision Medical Communications (EMC) business.

news.title: Regulatory tracker: Amgen, BeOne score China approval for lung cancer med Imdelltra
news.snippet: In this tracker, Fierce Pharma is recording the regulatory progress of in-market products, including expansions into key geographies and new indications. Some of these updates may not meet the bar for

news.title: The top 10 pharma R&D budgets of 2025

news.title: Bial launches ‘Dialogues with Parkinson’s’ campaign aimed at identifying early symptoms
news.snippet: Portuguese biopharma Bial is launching a year-long disease awareness campaign that’s intended to boost understanding of Parkinson’s disease and its often subtle and early-stage symptoms.

news.title: Abbott survey finds ‘information overload, confusion and cost’ affecting health choices in US
news.snippet: Too much information, uncertainty and financial worries are hitting Americans when it comes to making important choices for their health.

news.title: FDA accuses Amneal, BioCorRx of producing ‘false and misleading’ drug promos
news.snippet: Amneal and BioCorRx have earned the ire of the FDA’s Office of Prescription Drug Promotion (OPDP), with both being hit by accusations of violating the agency’s drug marketing rules.

news.title: Novartis pumps up community health footprint to tackle heart disease and cancer
news.snippet: Novartis is launching a three-front push to close healthcare gaps in heart disease and cancer, expanding initiatives with the goal of roughly tripling their footprint by 2030.

news.title: Vanda initiates study of motion sickness drug Nereus in GLP-1 users

news.title: Garda snaps up Assertio and chemo infection treatment Rolvedon in $125M deal

news.title: AbbVie challenges 'outdated' 340B drug discount program guidance in new lawsuit
news.snippet: AbbVie is spearheading a new battle in pharma's long-running fight to reform the federal government’s 340B drug discount program.

news.snippet: A cancer drug candidate that, rightly or wrongly, became a flashpoint at FDA, fails on a second try at approval.

news.title: New rules for CDC vaccine panel aim to address lawsuit, empower Kennedy’s allies

news.title: New light shed on who benefits most from weight-loss jabs
news.snippet: People who carry variations in two genes linked to appetite and digestion can lose more weight when taking drugs to treat obesity, research suggests.

news.title: Prince William praises £20m milestone for Bowelbabe fund
news.snippet: The Bowelbabe fund, set up by Dame Deborah James in 2022, helps to support Cancer Research UK.

news.title: Weight-loss jabs will be offered on NHS for people at risk of further heart attacks
news.snippet: More than a million people in England will start being offered the anti-obesity jab for better heart health and to avoid strokes.

news.title: 'Something wasn't right': Wrong sperm given to UK families by IVF clinics in northern Cyprus
news.snippet: Families of seven children believe the wrong sperm or egg donors were used in their IVF treatment.
